business_name: St. Clare of Assisi Catholic Church
notes: St. Clare of Assisi Catholic Church is confirmed at 3131 El Dorado Blvd, Houston TX (actual zip 77059). Permit is a 24,287 SF church remodel. Prior_match 'St Clare Knights of Columbus Council 9708; St. Clare of Assisi Catholic School' is consistent — school campus is co-located. Pastor: Fr. Vincent Vuong-Quoc Nguyen. Office hours M-F 8:30am-4:30pm.
